Now, quickly here, I just want to give you a kind of a recap of this whole section with body language. It might seem a bit wacky to you that I'm spending two minutes talking about a handshake, three minutes talking about how far you stand from someone, who you stand at an angle, face to face. It seems kind of ridiculous. But here's the bottom line. It works. This makes a profound difference on whether you're going to get inter-report with somebody or not get inter-report with somebody. So you just want to use these tools to give yourself that edge. Why not do this stuff if it works? For me, sometimes I say, wow, I'm not really comfortable with some of this stuff. I don't like dressing for success all the time. I don't always want to be conscious of standing at an angle or standing face to face. But I'll tell you this, I've learned over the years that by using these tools, I make my life easier down the road, meaning when I'm actually trying to close somebody. Because on that unconscious level, they simply feel some connection to me. And it makes everything else I do that much easier. So it just goes a long way to developing that image of a person that I want to do business with someone that I would trust, someone that is worth listening to.
